summary: Plan-only inventory classification: each hydrated PR is open, non-security-sensitive, and independent in this shard; no close, merge, fix, or raise-PR action is permitted or justified by the artifact.

actions.reason: Useful focused contributor PR awaiting maintainer review; keep outside this cleanup cluster rather than close or merge.
Substantial focused bug-fix PR with useful code and broad validation; technical correctness remains a maintainer review decision outside this inventory cleanup.
Focused contributor PR in a distinct Docker/docs/scripts area; preserve for maintainer review rather than closing in this shard.
Useful narrow PR but failing proof/checks require maintainer or author follow-up; keep independent and do not close.
Focused diagnostics PR with useful contributor code and passing validation; keep for maintainer review outside this cleanup cluster.
